languages.text: "Декабалус сам установил в центральную буровую установку ксеносское устройство?"
"Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"
languages.original_text: "Декабалус сам установил в центральную буровую установку ксеносское устройство?"

traits.locale_text: "Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"
"Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"
"Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill rig?"
"Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"
"Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"

languages.text: 「デカバラス自身、中央のドリル装置に異星人の装置を据えたのか？」
languages.original_text: "Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill rig?"

traits.locale_text: 「デカバラス自身、中央のドリル装置に異星人の装置を据えたのか？」

languages.text: «¿El propio Decabalus instaló un dispositivo xenos en el complejo central?».
languages.original_text: "Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"

traits.locale_text: «¿El propio Decabalus instaló un dispositivo xenos en el complejo central?».

languages.text: “德卡巴洛斯亲手在中央钻探中枢上安装了异形装置？”
languages.original_text: "Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"

traits.locale_text: “德卡巴洛斯亲手在中央钻探中枢上安装了异形装置？”

languages.text: "Decabalus hat selbst ein Xenosgerät im zentralen Bohrkomplex installiert?"
languages.original_text: "Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"

traits.locale_text: "Decabalus hat selbst ein Xenosgerät im zentralen Bohrkomplex installiert?"

languages.text: "Decabalus, merkezî, sondaj kompleksine bizzat bir zeno cihazı mı yerleştirdi?"
languages.original_text: "Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"

traits.locale_text: "Decabalus, merkezî, sondaj kompleksine bizzat bir zeno cihazı mı yerleştirdi?"

languages.text: « Décabalus lui-même a installé un appareil xénos sur la plateforme du complexe central ? »
languages.original_text: "Decabalus himself installed a xenos device in the central drill complex?"

traits.locale_text: « Décabalus lui-même a installé un appareil xénos sur la plateforme du complexe central ? »
